title: Basic JavaScript Parameters and Arguments
description: Write a function that demonstrates the core concepts of JavaScript Parameters and Arguments. Focus on implementing Default parameters correctly.

title: Intermediate JavaScript Parameters and Arguments
description: Create a function that uses Default parameters and Rest parameters (...args) together. Handle edge cases and validate inputs.

title: Advanced JavaScript Parameters and Arguments Project
description: Build a small application that applies Default parameters, Rest parameters (...args), arguments object in a real-world scenario. Include error handling and input validation.

title: Debugging JavaScript Parameters and Arguments
description: The following code has bugs related to Default parameters. Find and fix them.

title: Refactoring JavaScript Parameters and Arguments
description: Refactor the following code to use modern JavaScript patterns with Default parameters and Rest parameters (...args).
